name: Scanned bid PDFs — vision fallback
description: Extract data from scanned (no text layer) subcontractor bid PDFs, forcing the skill to use vision mode for extraction

inputs.user_prompt: Tabulate these bids for structural steel. Some of these are scanned documents.

expected_behavior: Detects that pdfplumber returns insufficient text and falls back to vision
Successfully reads bid data using vision on rasterized pages
Extracts bidder info, base bid amount, and line items from scanned documents
Correctly flags unclear values with [unclear] annotations rather than guessing
Handles mixed mode — some bids text-layer, some scanned
ground_truth_notes: Manually transcribed from the scanned bid documents.

vision_fallback.description: All scanned bids successfully processed via vision fallback

amount_accuracy.description: Base bid amounts match ground truth within $1 tolerance

line_item_completeness.description: Percentage of actual line items captured from scanned bids

uncertainty_flagging.description: Genuinely ambiguous values are flagged with [unclear] rather than silently guessed

format.description: Valid xlsx with all required tabs
